testcase.name: postvalidateAddressesandPostLocation

failure.message: expected [{"Location":{"Success":true,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Location updated successfully","Level":1}]}}] but found [{"Location":{"Success":false,"Data":{"Acknowledge":false,"AddressConfirm":true,"Confirm":true},"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"AddressId or AddressCode does not match Location. (2026)","Level":3}]}}]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"Location":{"Success":true,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Location updated successfully","Level":1}]}}] but found [{"Location":{"Success":false,"Data":{"Acknowledge":false,"AddressConfirm":true,"Confirm":true},"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"AddressId or AddressCode does not match Location. (2026)","Level":3}]}}] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at testcase.name: getbillingtransferProgress
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"Billing":{"Success":true,"Data":{"BatchId":"","Summary":{"BillingStartDate":"2000-04-17","BillingEndDate":"2000-04-17","PeriodStartDate":"2000-04-01","PeriodEndDate":"2000-04-17","TransferStartDate":"2000-04-17","TransferEndDate":"2000-04-17"},"Detail":[{"ServiceOrder":{"Number":"SORD00000000044","BillingDate":"2000-04-17","PeriodStartDate":"2000-04-01","PeriodEndDate":"2000-04-17","LocationId":"LOCATION009","CustomerId":"CUSTOMER010","TransferDate":"2000-04-17","EmployeeId":"CARN0001","BillToCustomerDeposit":{"Id":2,"Description":"Refund of Difference"},"ThirdPartyDeposit":{"Id":1,"Description":"Transfer"}}}]},"Messages":[]}}] but found [{"Billing":{"Success":true,"Data":{"BatchId":"","Summary":{"BillingStartDate":"2000-04-17","BillingEndDate":"2000-04-17","PeriodStartDate":"2000-04-01","PeriodEndDate":"2000-04-17","TransferStartDate":"2000-04-17","TransferEndDate":"2000-04-17"},"Detail":[{"ServiceOrder":{"Number":"SORD00000000044","BillingDate":"2000-04-17","PeriodStartDate":"2000-04-01","PeriodEndDate":"2000-04-17","LocationId":"LOCATION009","CustomerId":"CUSTOMER010","TransferDate":"2000-04-17","EmployeeId":"CARN0001","BillToCustomerDeposit":{"Id":2,"Description":"Refund of Difference"},"ThirdPartyDeposit":{"Id":1,"Description":"Transfer"}},"AllowTransferWithoutBill":false}]},"Messages":[]}}] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at
